title: agent_result_v1 shared base
description: Canonical agent_result_v1 envelope field set shared by every give-me-job spoke and referenced by the per-kind schemas via $ref. Mirrors .claude/skills/gmj-agent-output-contract/SKILL.md so existing emitters stay valid (back-compat locked).

artifact.description: One file or section a spoke wrote or confirmed.

envelope.description: The common agent_result_v1 envelope fields. Payload objects stay additionalProperties-permissive so per-kind schemas and later phases can extend without breaking this contract.

schema_version.description: Locked contract version string (e.g. "1.0.0") for forward-compatible evolution.

agent.description: Exact agent name (matches the .md filename without extension).

pipeline_run_id.description: Run id copied verbatim from the orchestrator prompt, or empty string if absent.

handoff_target.description: Null unless status is handoff; then the name of the next agent.

notes.description: One-line key outcome, counts, or handoff reason.
